raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable by the right arm from the back-mounted workspace and a side contact point is available without colliding with the cup in front of box_2. Stabilization is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and could transmit forces during lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing relative motion between box_1 and box_2 during the subsequent grasp and lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm has sufficient clearance to contact box_1 from the side without hitting box_2 (which is being stabilized) or the cup (in front of box_2). The grasp must be a whole-body/palm press grasp (no claw) since the box is 30 cm and exceeds the claw size limit.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector with a non-claw grasp, while box_2 remains stabilized to prevent snagging due to the attachment."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can make opposing lateral contacts on box_1 without colliding with each other, box_2, or the cup. Dual-arm support is required to lift a 30x30x30 cm box stably without the claw.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely controlled with two-arm lateral support, suitable for lifting despite the attachment to box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already supported by dual arms; the right arm can gradually reduce stabilization force on box_2 without causing sudden relative motion at the attachment or disturbing the cup in front of box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is no longer actively constrained; the robot maintains full control of box_1 with dual-arm support to complete the pickup."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable by the right arm from the back-mounted workspace and a side contact point is available without colliding with the cup in front of box_2. Stabilization is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and could transmit forces during lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing relative motion between box_1 and box_2 during the subsequent grasp and lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm has sufficient clearance to contact box_1 from the side without hitting box_2 (which is being stabilized) or the cup (in front of box_2). The grasp must be a whole-body/palm press grasp (no claw) since the box is 30 cm and exceeds the claw size limit.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector with a non-claw grasp, while box_2 remains stabilized to prevent snagging due to the attachment.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can make opposing lateral contacts on box_1 without colliding with each other, box_2, or the cup. Dual-arm support is required to lift a 30x30x30 cm box stably without the claw.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely controlled with two-arm lateral support, suitable for lifting despite the attachment to box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already supported by dual arms; the right arm can gradually reduce stabilization force on box_2 without causing sudden relative motion at the attachment or disturbing the cup in front of box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is no longer actively constrained; the robot maintains full control of box_1 with dual-arm support to complete the pickup.
